title: Nami Fights to Keep the Treasure
description: On pages 1–4, Nami’s obsession with treasure collides with Luffy’s blunt honesty and Buggy’s chaos.
scene: Nami tries to protect what she has stolen or earned, while the surrounding fight keeps pulling her deeper into the Straw Hats’ orbit.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Since when did you think you could fool me, Nami!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Let me send you painfully to the neither- world!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm not giving you a single thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Dare to kick my bottom half....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: 01!! Put that treasure down and go some- where safer!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're going to get chased again other- wise!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Put the treasure down and go!? I don't want to!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Why should I leave my treasure behind?!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Of course!!! Since I'm a pirate- treasure thief and I just stole from a pirate,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm telling you this treasure is mine!!!

summary: The part keeps Nami morally complicated: she is selfish, clever, and frightened, but also increasingly tied to Luffy and Zoro.
